title: corndogs - Wolf Armor as a Bandana
description: A resourcepack using entity model features and entity texture features that makes wolf armor appear as a dyeable bandana.
body:
The corndogs resourcepack replaces the vanilla wolf armor model on adult tamed wolves with a snazzy bandana model! The bandana is dyable in the exact same way wolf armor is, allowing for lots of different color combinations. The wolf armor still retains the exact same item model, crafting recipe, and repairability via scutes as vanilla minecraft, but the model while on the wolf is that of a bandana. 

I made a video explaining/featuring this resourcepack, link here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zP8oV4tzwQc
